description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named FISCO-BCOS that runs on push events to all branches except those matching **-1.3 or **-1.5, and tags except v1.*, and paths except docs/**, Changelog.md, and README.md. It also runs on pull requests and published, created, or edited releases. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-16.04, ubuntu-18.04, and macOS, checking out the code, caching dependencies, installing OS-specific dependencies, configuring with cmake, compiling with make, and running unit tests.
